description: Style Note Updated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both! Heel: 3.5" Product Description Elasticated black forefoot, midfoot straps and an elasticated ankle loop Padded footbed with a heel patch Tough plastic midsole and heel (with a heel patch) One piece grooved TPU outsole at the forefoot Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
